body:
Amara, hope you're having a good start to the week — I wanted to follow up on our conversation from the [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital) dinner last month, where you mentioned you were actively looking at a few interesting climate infrastructure plays in the pipeline. I've been tracking a Series A round for a grid-edge storage company out of Austin that I think could be a strong fit for your thesis, and I'd love to get your read on the space before they kick off their formal process. The founding team has deep roots in utility-scale deployment, which I know you've flagged as a key differentiator in previous deals. Would you have 30 minutes sometime next week to walk through the deck together? Happy to work around your schedule.

Anna
